texto: Nothing exists without music; for the universe itself is said to have been framed by a kind of harmony of sounds, and the heaven itself revolves under the tones of that harmony.
explicacao: Citação de Eustace Mandeville Wetenhall Tillyard sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Nothing exists without music; for the universe itself is said to have been framed by a kind of ha…” articula reflexao, harmony, music em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como music.
